title: Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) enhancements
body:
* **Share Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) with all account users**: The share modal now includes an option to share your Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) with all account users. See [Share a Genie Agent](/aws/en/genie/set-up#share).
* **SQL download settings for full query results**: The APIs to download full query results now respect workspace-level settings for SQL downloads.
